mnemonics.title: Bus Components
mnemonics.content: DAC - Data, Address, Control lines (the three components of a bus)

mnemonics.title: I/O Methods
mnemonics.content: PID - Programmed, Interrupt-driven, DMA (the three main I/O transfer methods in order of increasing sophistication)

mnemonics.title: DMA Process
mnemonics.content: ICS - Initialize, Control, Signal (the three steps of DMA operation: Initialize parameters, Control bus transfer, Signal completion)
